tasks.description: Fix and patch the race condition in Stripe payment gateway failing under high concurrent load.
Perform a comprehensive regression test of the multi-tenant architecture on Chrome, Firefox, and Safari.
Review the 'How It Works' section of the marketing blog post for technical accuracy and jargon reduction.
Capture high-resolution screenshots of the new analytics dashboard once the staging environment is stable.
Allocate 4 hours to investigate and document findings for the memory leak in the Titan reporting service.
Investigate database connection pool performance issues on the staging server after the Odyssey launch.
Prepare a brief document for A/B testing homepage headline copy post-launch to optimize conversion.
